headline: Tariff refunds unlikely to benefit consumers, CNBC CFO Council survey finds
summary: Although the government could pay billions of dollars in tariff refunds, consumers shouldn't expect to see money back, according to a CNBC CFO Council survey.

raw.headline: Tariff refunds unlikely to benefit consumers, CNBC CFO Council survey finds
raw.summary: Although the government could pay billions of dollars in tariff refunds, consumers shouldn't expect to see money back, according to a CNBC CFO Council survey.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Moodys, Lowers Price Target to $560
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $660 to $560.
